type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Lower operating hours for the Dryer. Emission test rates are measured during one day of the year but are expected to represent every day of the year.  Using emission rates based on a running average over multiple years helps to smooth out the  extreme changes that may occur from year to year.
